name: List Item
description: An individual item within a list component.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Override parent list `interactive` setting for this item. Falls back to parent `<kb-list>` value when `undefined`.

props.name: divider
props.description: Override parent list `dividers` setting for this item. Falls back to parent `<kb-list>` value when `undefined`.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the item, preventing interaction and applying reduced opacity.

props.name: href
props.description: URL to navigate to - renders the item as an anchor element.

props.name: target
props.description: Link target attribute, e.g. `'_blank'`. Only used when `href` is set.

slots.name: secondary
slots.description: Secondary description text below or beside the primary content.

slots.name: trailing
slots.description: Trailing content (badge, arrow, etc.) aligned to the right.

events.name: kb-click
events.description: Dispatched when an interactive item is clicked or activated via keyboard.
